titles.title: Will there be any stars in my crown?

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am thinking today of that beautiful land I shall reach when the sun goeth down When thro wonderful grace by my savior I stand Will there be any stars in my crown?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Will there be any stars, any stars in my crown When at evening the sun goeth down When I wake with the blest in the mansions of rest Will there be any stars in my crown

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the strength of the Lord let me labor and pray Let me watch as a winner of souls That bright stars may be mine in the glorious day When His praise like the sea billows roll

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh what joy it will be when His face I behold Living gems at his feet to lay down If would sweeter my bliss in the city of gold Should there be any stars in my crown
